title: cryptantha kingii
intro: Cryptantha kingii, also known as King's cryptantha, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Cryptantha kingii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
